message:
feat(search): permission-aware visibility + redaction guardrails (br-3vwi.2.4)

Add scope enforcement and field-level redaction to the search planner:

- ScopePolicy enum: Unrestricted, CallerScoped, ProjectSet
- RedactionConfig with contact_blocked() and strict() presets
- apply_visibility() post-processing with deny/redact logic
- SearchAuditEntry for deterministic audit trail of denied/redacted results
- ProjectSet scope enforcement via SQL WHERE clauses at plan time
- CallerScoped deferred to post-processing (requires agent identity resolution)
- Extended SearchQuery, SearchResult, SearchResponse, QueryExplain with scope fields
- 21 new tests covering all scope policies, redaction configs, and audit entries

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
